body.title: agent_datacenter: central log tree + AGENT_DATACENTER_HOME env var
body.result: AGENT_DATACENTER_HOME env var, agent_datacenter_home/logs helpers, agentctl init --instance stamps full tree, LoggingControlCenter auto-configures from env, IgorDevice/Shim defaults updated
body.description:
Logs are scattered across ~/.TheIgors/. Create a hierarchical ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/<system|comms-channel>/ tree, introduce AGENT_DATACENTER_HOME env var (default ~/.agent_datacenter/, used everywhere), update LoggingControlCenter root to respect it, and update agentctl init to stamp the full directory structure idempotently.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/logcontrol/control_center.py, agent_datacenter/cli/agentctl.py, config/device_config.py (add AGENT_DATACENTER_HOME constant), devices/igor/device.py + shim.py (update default log paths)
**Design rules:** oop-first (LoggingControlCenter already a class, keep shape), test-plan-or-why-not applies
**Scope boundary:** IN: create dirs, wire LoggingControlCenter, env var, agentctl stamps tree. OUT: moving existing log files (that's T-adc-instance-home-migration), console capture (T-adc-console-capture)
**Test plan:** agentctl init is idempotent (run twice, no error, correct dirs exist); LoggingControlCenter writes to new root when AGENT_DATACENTER_HOME is set; AGENT_DATACENTER_HOME=/ test shows correct resolution
